# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Continuous Deployment to Production

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '18'
  APP_NAME: ${{ vars.APP_NAME || 'my-application' }}

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 1

  test:
    name: Test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run linter
        run: npm run lint

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Run integration tests
        run: npm run test:integration
        env:
          CI: true

  deploy-production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - build
      - test
    environment:
      name: production
      url: ${{ vars.PRODUCTION_URL || 'https://example.com' }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: dist/

      - name: Configure deployment credentials
        run: |
          echo "Configuring credentials for production deployment..."
        env:
          DEPLOY_KEY: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_KEY }}
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_TOKEN }}

      - name: Deploy to production
        run: |
          echo "Deploying ${{ env.APP_NAME }} to production..."
          echo "Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          # Replace the following with your actual deployment command, e.g.:
          # npx serverless deploy --stage production
          # aws s3 sync dist/ s3://${{ vars.S3_BUCKET }} --delete
          # kubectl apply -f k8s/production/
          # az webapp deploy --name ${{ vars.AZURE_WEBAPP_NAME }} --src-path dist/
          npm run deploy:production
        env:
          DEPLOY_KEY: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_KEY }}
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
          PRODUCTION_URL: ${{ vars.PRODUCTION_URL }}

      - name: Verify deployment
        run: |
          echo "Verifying production deployment..."
          # Replace with actual health check
          # curl --fail --retry 5 --retry-delay 10 "${{ vars.PRODUCTION_URL }}/health"
          npm run verify:production
        env:
          PRODUCTION_URL: ${{ vars.PRODUCTION_URL }}

      - name: Notify deployment success
        if: success()
        run: |
          echo "✅ Production deployment successful!"
          echo "Application: ${{ env.APP_NAME }}"
          echo "Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Deployed by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Time: $(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"

      - name: Notify deployment failure
        if: failure()
        run: |
          echo "❌ Production deployment FAILED!"
          echo "Application: ${{ env.APP_NAME }}"
          echo "Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Please investigate immediately."
